name: Tuna in Scapece with Scallion Frocia
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 2 quarts of water to a boil.
2. Cut the tuna into 3/4-inch cubes and drop them into the boiling water. Lower the heat to simmer and cook for 2 minutes. Drain carefully and set onto a serving platter to cool in one layer.
3. In a mixing bowl, stir together olive oil, vinegar, garlic, tomatoes, mint, crushed peppers, and oregano flowers.
4. When the tuna is cool, pour the liquid over it and set aside.
5. Heat 3 tablespoons of olive oil until smoking in a 6-inch to 8-inch non-stick sauté pan.
6. In a mixing bowl, stir together eggs, scallions, and Pecorino. Pour into the smoking pan and cook until the omelet is set. Cool and cut into 6 pieces.
7. Divide the tuna over the pieces of frocia and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
